import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{collection,addDoc,onSnapshot,query,orderBy}from'firebase/firestore';import{db}from'./firebase';import Landing from'./components/Landing';import Header from'./components/Header';import Wall from'./components/Wall';import ViewNoteModal from'./components/ViewNoteModal';import CreateNoteModal from'./components/CreateNoteModal';import Toast from'./components/Toast';import useLocalStorage from'./hooks/useLocalStorage';import useToast from'./hooks/useToast';import'./styles/global.css';/**
 * App — root component.
 *
 * State:
 *   alias        — current user alias (persisted to localStorage)
 *   notes        — array of note objects (synced from Firestore)
 *   hasEntered   — whether landing screen has been dismissed
 *   loading      — true while initial Firestore fetch is in progress

 *   creating     — whether CreateNoteModal is open
 */import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const[alias,setAlias]=useLocalStorage('fw_alias','');const[hasEntered,setHasEntered]=useState(!!alias);const[hasEverEntered,setHasEverEntered]=useState(!!alias);const[notes,setNotes]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[viewingNote,setViewingNote]=useState(null);const[creating,setCreating]=useState(false);const{message:toastMsg,visible:toastVisible,showToast}=useToast();// ── FIRESTORE: real-time listener ──
useEffect(()=>{const q=query(collection(db,'notes'),orderBy('ts','asc'));const unsubscribe=onSnapshot(q,snapshot=>{const fetched=snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));setNotes(fetched);setLoading(false);});// Cleanup listener on unmount

const handleEnter=name=>{setAlias(name);setHasEntered(true);setHasEverEntered(true);};const handleLogout=()=>{setAlias('');setHasEntered(false);setViewingNote(null);setCreating(false);};const handleAddNote=()=>setCreating(true);const handlePost=async _ref=>{let{html,color}=_ref;try{await addDoc(collection(db,'notes'),{alias,html,color,ts:Date.now()});setCreating(false);showToast('📌 Note pinned to the wall!');}catch(err){console.error('Failed to save note:',err);showToast('⚠️ Could not save note. Check your connection.');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[!hasEntered&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Landing,{onEnter:handleEnter,isReturning:hasEverEntered}),hasEntered&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Header,{alias:alias,onAddNote:handleAddNote,onLogout:handleLogout}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Wall,{notes:notes,loading:loading,onNoteClick:setViewingNote})]}),viewingNote&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ViewNoteModal,{note:viewingNote,onClose:()=>setViewingNote(null)}),creating&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CreateNoteModal,{onPost:handlePost,onClose:()=>setCreating(false)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Toast,{message:toastMsg,visible:toastVisible})]});}export default App;
